name: Glass Foundry
unlockCondition: Glass Guild membership, Murano residency permission
shortDescription: Primary facility for melting raw materials into glass. Requires substantial fuel and produces significant heat.
fullDescription: The heart of Venetian glassmaking, foundries convert sand, soda ash, and minerals into the famed cristallo glass. Due to fire risks and to protect trade secrets, glass foundries are strictly limited to Murano island by order of the Republic. These specialized facilities feature massive furnaces that operate continuously at extreme temperatures.
flavorText: The furnaces of Murano burn day and night, crafting transparency from mere sand—perhaps the closest mortal men come to performing true alchemy.

productionInformation.productionRate: 15 units of molten glass per day

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Must be built on Murano Island only
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Requires water access for fuel delivery
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Decreases property value of adjacent residential buildings, increases fire risk in a small radius

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian glass foundry under construction on Murano island, wooden scaffolding around brick furnace structure, partial stone walls, massive chimney partially built, workers laying fire-resistant materials, clay crucibles waiting to be installed, construction materials piled nearby, wooden roof beams exposed, canal-side loading area partially completed, historically accurate glassmaking facility, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, warm terracotta and brick textures
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian glass foundry on Murano island, large brick structure with massive central chimney billowing light smoke, multiple furnace openings glowing orange, stone foundation, red tile roof with ventilation openings, weathered brick exterior, canal-side loading dock with supply crates, small windows set high in walls, wooden double doors for fuel delivery, metal reinforcements around furnace openings, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, warm color palette with glowing furnace accents, workers visible near intense heat

specialAbilities: Can create custom glass colors with special mineral combinations
upgradePath: Advanced Foundry (higher output, more efficient fuel use)

riskFactors.fireRisk: Very High (40% higher than average building)

soundDesign.ambientSound: Roaring furnace, crackling fire, occasional steam hiss
soundDesign.activitySounds: Metal tools clinking on glass, worker commands, bellows pumping

seasonalEffects.winter: Higher fuel consumption, warmer working environment
seasonalEffects.summer: Extremely hot working conditions, reduced efficiency
seasonalEffects.venetianFestivals: Special color batches for festival glassware

name: Silk Conditioning House
shortDescription: Specialized facility for preparing raw silk for weaving through washing, stretching, and treating.
fullDescription: The crucial first step in Venice's lucrative silk industry, these specialized facilities prepare raw silk through complex processes of washing, stretching, and treating. Featuring carefully controlled environments for humidity and temperature, silk conditioning houses require both technical expertise and significant water resources. The quality of Venetian textiles depends heavily on this initial preparation.
flavorText: Before the shimmer of silk can adorn a nobleman, it must first be bathed, stretched, and coaxed into perfection—like any Venetian preparing for a grand appearance.

productionInformation.productionRate: 18 units of prepared silk per day

locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Slight water pollution, increased humidity in vicinity

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian silk conditioning house under construction, specialized textile facility, large water cisterns being installed, soaking tanks taking shape, steam ventilation systems, specialized drying racks, stretching mechanisms being assembled, temperature control features, water supply channels, humidity-controlled rooms partially built, workers installing specialized equipment from the East, technically complex structure, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, combination of Venetian exterior with technical interior features
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian silk conditioning house, specialized textile preparation facility, elegant but practical facade, multiple chimneys for steam ventilation, large water cisterns visible, interior showing series of washing vats and soaking tanks, specialized silk stretching frames, carefully controlled drying areas with precise humidity monitoring, workers in protective garments handling delicate fibers, imported Eastern equipment, quality control area with perfect light conditions, water channels and drainage systems, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, steam rising from processing areas, gleaming wet silk being carefully handled, technical artistry of silk preparation visible, warm colors with water reflections

specialAbilities: Quality enhancement for all silk products
upgradePath: Advanced Conditioning House (higher quality, special treatments)

soundDesign.ambientSound: Water flowing, steam venting, silk being stretched
soundDesign.activitySounds: Workers calling measurements, pulleys creaking, water splashing

seasonalEffects.winter: Higher fuel consumption for heating water
seasonalEffects.shipping seasons: Activity peaks with silk shipment arrivals

name: Shipyard
unlockCondition: Shipwright Guild membership, waterfront property, 15,000 ducats capital
shortDescription: Facility for construction and repair of maritime vessels, from small boats to trading ships.
fullDescription: The backbone of Venice's maritime power, private shipyards construct and maintain the merchant fleet that drives the city's commerce. Featuring slipways for vessel construction, specialized workshops for component fabrication, and direct water access, these industrial facilities require substantial space and resources. While not as large as the state-run Arsenal, private shipyards are vital to maintaining Venice's commercial fleet.
flavorText: From oak and pitch and canvas, we conjure vessels that will challenge the Mediterranean and return laden with the world's riches—or consign their investors to bankruptcy.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Must be built on deep waterfront
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Requires direct deep water access with approach channel
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Significant noise pollution, water traffic increase, wood dust in vicinity

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian shipyard under construction, massive waterfront industrial complex, extensive foundation work at water's edge, multiple slipways being created for vessel construction, large covered workshop areas taking shape, timber storage structures, ship mold templates being installed, massive cranes and pulley systems, framework for launching mechanisms, smithy for metal components partially built, pitch processing area with safety features, workers creating specialized construction jigs, large-scale industrial construction with specialized maritime features, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, organized industrial zone with water access
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian shipyard, impressive maritime industrial complex directly on water, multiple slipways with ships in various stages of construction, ships' wooden skeleton frames visible, large covered workshops for specialized components, massive timber storage yard with sorted woods, sail loft with canvas work happening, blacksmith shop for metal fittings, pitch and oakum processing area, intricate pulley and crane systems for moving heavy components, workers swarming over partially completed vessel hulls, launching mechanism for completed ships, small boats moored nearby, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, detailed shipbuilding activities visible, organized chaos of maritime construction, different specialized zones for various aspects of shipbuilding, small office for designers and contracts

soundDesign.ambientSound: Hammering, sawing, creaking timber, water lapping
soundDesign.activitySounds: Workers shouting measurements, pulleys creaking, ship hulls being caulked

seasonalEffects.winter: Reduced exterior work, focus on interior fittings
seasonalEffects.stormySeasons: Additional repair work for damaged vessels

name: Mint
unlockCondition: State license only, not privately available without exceptional Senate connections
shortDescription: Official facility for producing Venetian coinage from precious metals under strict government oversight.
fullDescription: The literal economic engine of Venice, the mint (Zecca) transforms gold and silver into the ducats and other coins that power commerce. Operating under the strictest security and quality control, this heavily guarded facility features specialized workshops for metal purification, coin striking, and verification. The consistent quality of Venetian currency was a key factor in the city's commercial dominance.
flavorText: All wealth flows from these walls—but never forget that each coin bears not just gold, but the very authority of the Republic itself.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: San Marco district only, near government center
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Requires heavy security, proximity to Treasury
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Increases security in surrounding area, creates high-value target

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian mint under construction, heavily secured government facility, substantial stone foundation with reinforced vaults being built, specialized metalworking areas taking shape, coin striking equipment being installed, assay furnaces for metal testing, secure bullion storage vaults with multiple locks, guard stations at all access points, private canal access for secure deliveries, heavy iron gates and security measures, government officials supervising every aspect of construction, artisans installing precision equipment for coin production, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, emphasis on security features and precision construction
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian mint (Zecca), imposing official building with fortress-like security features, heavy stone construction with minimal windows, multiple guard posts with armed personnel, secure bullion delivery entrance with canal access, main production hall with coin striking presses in operation, assay office with precision scales and testing equipment, die-cutting workshop where master engravers create coin designs, enormous vault with multiple locks for finished currency, official state symbols prominently displayed, quality control stations, ducal inspectors in official robes, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, sense of absolute precision and security, workers in specialized roles striking coins, melting precious metals, and performing quality checks, treasure chests being prepared for transport

soundDesign.ambientSound: Metal striking, coin counting, secure locks operating
soundDesign.activitySounds: Hammering coin dies, molten metal pouring, verification testing

seasonalEffects.wartime: Special production runs for military financing

name: Bakery
shortDescription: Facility producing bread and pastries, an essential food service for the urban population.
fullDescription: A staple of every Venetian neighborhood, bakeries provide essential daily bread as well as sweet and savory pastries. Featuring stone ovens, preparation areas, and often a small retail space, these establishments operate from pre-dawn to serve the community. Their regulated prices and consistent operation made them crucial to urban food security in Renaissance Venice.
flavorText: The scent of fresh bread has ended more neighborhood disputes than any magistrate's decree—for even bitter enemies must still eat side by side.

locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Pleasant aroma in vicinity, slight warmth, minor smoke

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian bakery under construction, small production facility with retail front, main feature is large brick oven being built with specialized heat distribution system, baking stone installation, wood storage area, flour storage with moisture protection, kneading tables being constructed, retail counter taking shape, small chimney for oven ventilation, water access point for dough making, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on the massive brick oven as central element
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian bakery, charming small building with stone oven as central feature, glowing fire visible in massive brick oven, wooden preparation tables dusted with flour, dough being kneaded by bakers, fresh bread cooling on racks, small retail area with display counter, bread varieties arranged for sale, early morning customers waiting for fresh loaves, bakers working with long wooden paddles to retrieve bread from oven, water barrel for dough preparation, flour sacks in storage area, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, warm inviting atmosphere with golden-brown bread colors, steam rising from fresh loaves, sense of neighborhood essential service, small sign with baker's guild symbol

soundDesign.ambientSound: Oven crackling, dough being kneaded, wood splitting
soundDesign.activitySounds: Bread being thumped for doneness, customer interactions, early morning activity

name: Glassblower Workshop
unlockCondition: Glass Guild membership, Murano permission, Glass Foundry access
shortDescription: Specialized facility where skilled artisans shape molten glass into fine objects and art pieces.
fullDescription: The creative heart of Venice's famed glass industry, these workshops transform molten glass from foundries into exquisite finished pieces. Featuring glassblowing stations with specialized tools, annealing ovens for controlled cooling, and display areas for completed works, these facilities combine industrial process with artistic creativity. Master glassblowers command tremendous respect for their skill in manipulating this challenging material.
flavorText: Between the breath of the master and the heat of the furnace, ordinary sand is transformed into objects of such delicacy that they appear to defy the very nature of matter itself.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Must be built on Murano Island only
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Benefits from proximity to Glass Foundry
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Increases area prestige, slight heat pollution

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian glassblower workshop under construction on Murano, specialized artisan facility, workstations being installed with glassblowing benches, glory holes (reheating openings) being constructed, annealing ovens for controlled cooling taking shape, tool storage and specialized equipment areas, master's demonstration platform, apprentice stations, marver tables for shaping glass, design area with pattern books, ventilation systems for worker comfort, preparing display area for finished works, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on specialized equipment for this prestigious craft
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian glassblower workshop on Murano, specialized artistic production facility, central area features master glassblower working with molten gather on blowpipe, skilled manipulation of glowing orange glass visible, multiple workstations with glory holes for reheating, marver tables for rolling glass, wooden shaping tools, apprentices assisting or working on simpler pieces, finished works cooling slowly in annealing ovens, display area showing exquisite completed pieces, pattern books and design sketches, specialized tools hung precisely, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, dramatic lighting from molten glass and glory holes, sense of artistic precision and ancient craft, quality finished pieces catching light, atmosphere combining intense heat and artistic refinement

upgradePath: Master Glassblower Studio (highest quality, signature pieces)

soundDesign.ambientSound: Glass being heated, gentle blowing, tools on hot glass
soundDesign.activitySounds: Master giving instructions, glass cracking when flawed, cooling sounds

seasonalEffects.summer: More difficult working conditions due to heat
seasonalEffects.diplomatic season: Focus on prestigious gift pieces for foreign dignitaries

name: Dye Works
shortDescription: Specialized facility for coloring fabrics and textiles using various natural dyes and fixing agents.
fullDescription: Essential to Venice's textile industry, dye works transform plain fabrics into the vibrant colors that made Venetian textiles famous throughout Europe. Featuring large vats for immersion, drying yards, and specialized processes for different colorants, these facilities require significant technical knowledge. Venice's trade connections gave it access to exotic dyestuffs from around the Mediterranean and beyond.
flavorText: The secret of our crimson is not merely in the kermes insects, but in water, time, and tradition passed from master to apprentice through generations of colored hands and careful eyes.

productionInformation.productionRate: 28 units of dyed fabric per day

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Industrial areas with water access, often Cannaregio
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Colorful water runoff, distinctive smells, potential water pollution

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian dye works under construction, specialized industrial facility, large rounded dyeing vats being installed, water supply channels, drainage systems for colored effluent, specialized ventilation for dye fumes, drying yard with hanging racks taking shape, mordant mixing area with safety features, storage for valuable dyestuffs with security, temperature control systems for vats, multiple workstations for different colors to prevent contamination, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, industrial character with specialized technical features
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian dye works, distinctive industrial facility with steaming colored vats, workers using long poles to manipulate fabric in bubbling dye baths of different vivid colors, large drying yard with rainbow of drying textiles hanging on frames, specialized areas for different dye types, mordant preparation area with alum and other fixatives, color testing station with sample swatches, drainage channels with colored water, specialized storage for expensive dye materials (indigo, kermes, brazilwood), protective equipment for workers handling caustic materials, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, vibrant colors creating visual spectacle, steam rising from hot dye vats, sense of industrial process combined with artisanal knowledge, distinct workstations for different color families

upgradePath: Master Dye Works (rare colors, higher efficiency)

soundDesign.ambientSound: Bubbling vats, fabric splashing, steam venting
soundDesign.activitySounds: Workers calling color names, poles stirring vats, wringing wet fabric

seasonalEffects.fashionSeasons: Seasonal color shifts based on trends

name: Blacksmith
shortDescription: Workshop producing iron tools, fittings, and basic metal goods for everyday use.
fullDescription: An essential service in any district, blacksmiths craft the metal components needed for construction, shipping, and daily life. Featuring a forge, anvils, quenching tanks, and metalworking tools, these workshops combine practical craftsmanship with industrial production. From nails and hinges to tools and decorative ironwork, blacksmiths support nearly every other industry in Venice.
flavorText: Without my hinges, your doors would not swing; without my nails, your ships would come apart; without my locks, your wealth would vanish—yet few think of the blacksmith until something breaks.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: All districts, often in industrial zones
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Water access for cooling, separation from residential due to noise

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian blacksmith shop under construction, industrial workshop with central forge area being built, chimney and ventilation system taking shape, anvil mounting blocks being set, water quenching tanks being installed, fuel storage area, tool wall framework, workbenches for detailed metal finishing, customer transaction area, metal storage with security features, heavy foundational work to support weighty equipment, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on the forge as central feature
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian blacksmith shop, working industrial facility with glowing forge at center, blacksmith working red-hot iron on large anvil, sparks flying, apprentices pumping bellows and assisting with larger pieces, various tools hanging on walls (hammers, tongs, punches, chisels), quenching tank steaming as hot metal is cooled, finished products displayed (hinges, locks, tools, nails, decorative items), order slips from shipwrights and builders, smoke rising from chimney, small retail area for direct sales, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, dramatic lighting from forge fire, sense of essential industry, contrast between dark workshop and glowing metal, sturdy practical construction built to withstand intense heat and heavy work

soundDesign.ambientSound: Hammering on anvil, bellows pumping, forge roaring
soundDesign.activitySounds: Metal being quenched with steam hiss, filing, customer orders

seasonalEffects.winter: More comfortable working conditions, higher heating efficiency
seasonalEffects.summer: Extremely hot working conditions, reduced efficiency

name: Goldsmith Workshop
unlockCondition: 10,000 ducats capital, Goldsmith Guild membership, noble patronage
shortDescription: High-end workshop crafting precious metal jewelry, religious objects, and luxury items.
fullDescription: Representing the pinnacle of metalworking craftsmanship, goldsmith workshops create the finest jewelry and precious objects for Venice's elite. Featuring specialized tools for intricate work, secure facilities for valuable materials, and often a discreet showroom, these establishments combine artistic excellence with extreme security. Their creations symbolize wealth and status throughout Venetian society.
flavorText: Gold speaks of wealth, but in my hands it whispers of eternity—for while the merchant merely possesses gold, I transform it into legacy.

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Premium locations in San Marco, Rialto
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Security considerations, proximity to wealthy clients
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Increases area prestige, heightened security presence

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian goldsmith workshop under construction, high-end luxury crafting space, secure vault being installed with multiple locks, specialized workbenches with precision tools, jeweler's stations with perfect lighting design, gem-setting areas, small but powerful forges for precious metals, polishing and finishing stations, discreet but elegant client reception area, display cases with security features, quality materials throughout construction, security measures being integrated into structure, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, combination of workshop functionality and high-end aesthetics
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian goldsmith workshop, refined luxury production facility, master goldsmith working at central bench with magnifying apparatus examining intricate piece, apprentices at secondary stations performing detailed work, tiny precision tools arranged perfectly, small specialized furnace for melting precious metals, gem-setting station with perfect lighting, secure vault with substantial door visible, elegant but discreet client reception area with display cases showing exquisite finished pieces, scales for weighing precious materials, sketches of commissioned designs, security features subtly integrated throughout, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, atmospheric lighting highlighting gold and gems, sense of artistic precision combined with luxury, wealthy clients being shown custom designs, secure transaction area

upgradePath: Master Jeweler Workshop (highest prestige, ducal commissions)

soundDesign.ambientSound: Gentle metalworking, quiet precision tools, soft conversation
soundDesign.activitySounds: Gold being hammered delicately, gems being set, client consultations

name: Paper Mill
shortDescription: Facility converting rags and fibers into paper sheets through mechanical processing.
fullDescription: Essential to Venice's intellectual and commercial life, paper mills transform rags and plant fibers into the paper used for books, documents, and correspondence. Featuring water-powered stamping hammers, drying facilities, and sizing baths, these industrial operations require significant water resources. Venice's early adoption of paper manufacturing supported its prominence in publishing and record-keeping.
flavorText: From discarded rags we create the very foundation of knowledge, commerce, and governance—for without paper, thoughts remain ephemeral and agreements merely spoken.

productionInformation.productionRate: 300 sheets per day at various qualities

locationRequirements.districtRestrictions: Requires flowing water, often outside city proper
locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Must have water wheel access, substantial water supply
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Water pollution downstream, fiber dust in vicinity

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian paper mill under construction, industrial facility with water power focus, water wheel mechanism being installed, stamping hammer system taking shape, large vats for pulp preparation, drainage systems and water channels, rag storage and processing area, drying loft with ventilation, sizing bath installation, cutting and finishing room, mechanical systems for pulp processing, substantial foundation work for water-powered machinery, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on water management systems and industrial machinery
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian paper mill, substantial industrial facility with large water wheel powering mechanical hammers, workers processing rags into fiber, massive vats where pulp is mixed and prepared, couching area where sheets are formed using wooden frames and wire screens, pressing mechanism removing excess water from newly formed sheets, drying loft with hundreds of sheets hanging to dry, sizing bath for treating finished paper, cutting and sorting room for final processing, stacks of finished paper in different grades and sizes, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, water flowing through various stages of the process, sense of continuous production flow, workers specialized in different stages from rag selection to final quality control, water-powered mechanical elements creating an early industrial atmosphere

upgradePath: Advanced Paper Mill (finer papers, special formulations)

soundDesign.ambientSound: Water wheel turning, stamping hammers pounding, water flowing
soundDesign.activitySounds: Paper sheets being lifted, pressing mechanism operating, sorting

seasonalEffects.rainy seasons: Water quality issues affect paper quality

name: Printing House
unlockCondition: 12,000 ducats capital, Senate permission, Printer's Guild membership
shortDescription: Specialized workshop producing printed books, maps, and documents using mechanical presses.
fullDescription: At the forefront of Renaissance information technology, printing houses use mechanical presses to produce multiple copies of texts and images. Featuring type-setting areas, printing presses, drying racks, and bindery facilities, these workshops revolutionized the spread of knowledge. Venice became an early center of printing, with its strategic position and trade networks facilitating distribution throughout Europe.
flavorText: What once required a monastery of scribes working for months can now be accomplished in days—we are not merely making books, but building a new age of knowledge itself.

locationRequirements.adjacentRequirements: Good transport access, some distance from residences (noise)
locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Ink smell, noise pollution, intellectual atmosphere

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian printing house under construction, specialized publishing facility, press foundation being reinforced for stability, type-setting area with specialized furniture, ink preparation area with safety features, paper storage with humidity control, press mechanisms being assembled with precision components, drying racks installation, bindery area taking shape, proof-reading tables with good lighting design, censorship inspection area (required by Venetian law), isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on the mechanical printing presses as central elements, specialized work areas for each phase of book production

soundDesign.ambientSound: Press mechanisms squeaking, paper shuffling, type being sorted
soundDesign.activitySounds: Press lever operation, binding tools, proof-reading discussions

seasonalEffects.religious calendar: Prayer book and religious text production
